drl:
rule "R0"
salience -1
when
    accumulate( T0(f0 == -3, $s0_0 : f0); $a0_0 : sum($s0_0) )
    not(T0(f1 != 3.0) and T0(f1 > 5, f0 == $a0_0))
then
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T0($b1_0_0 : f2)
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p1_0.getF0(), false));
    insertLogical(new T1($p1_0.getF0(), $p1_0.isF2()));
end
rule "R2"
salience -4
agenda-group "gb"
when
    $p2_0 : T0($b2_0_0 : f0, $b2_0_1 : f0)
    $p2_1 : T0(f1 not in (4.0, 0.5), f0 <= $b2_0_0, f2 == false)
    T0($b2_2_0 : f0)
then
    modify($p2_1) { setF2(true) }
end
name: fz_315001_1803
